name: Ted Mason
bio: Ted Mason is the Chief of Staff to retiring Commissioner Kevin Morrison (District 15). Morrison is retiring to run for U.S. Congress (IL-08). Mason is running to succeed him. Additional candidates in this open-seat race require further research.
prior_office: Chief of Staff to Cook County Commissioner Kevin Morrison (District 15)

jacket.source: Illinois State Board of Elections (not retrieved)
jacket.note: Campaign finance not retrieved; insider candidate with Morrison backing

career_history.role: Chief of Staff to Cook County Commissioner Kevin Morrison (District 15)
